steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The goal is to indicate the size of the Massasoit NWR. The strongest clue in the notes is 184 acres, the only direct numerical reference to size.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice A explicitly includes encompasses 184 acres, directly using the size data from the notes. The other three choices discuss management, endangered species, or location but omit the size information. That matches choice A — A is correct.
